hero.tagline: I ship production systems with AI as my pair programmer. 216+ tests, CI/CD on day 13.

linkedin.tagline: Experienced fullstack engineer who uses AI as a production tool throughout the SDLC. 13 days to production. 216+ tests. No shortcuts.

cv-vn.eyebrow: ⚡ Kỹ Sư Fullstack Tăng Cường AI · Sẵn Sàng
cv-vn.tagline: Tôi xây dựng hệ thống production với AI như cộng sự. 216+ bài test, CI/CD ngày 13. Không đường tắt.

sapo-social-channel.description: Omnichannel social commerce platform — Facebook, Instagram, Zalo unified inbox.
sapo-social-channel.artistStatement: As a member of the Sapo Social Channel team, I developed and maintained the unified inbox across Facebook, Instagram, and Zalo. I led the Node 14→18 and React 16→18 upgrades, integrated Sentry for real-time error monitoring, and contributed to the Grafana dashboards.
sapo-social-channel.lessonsLearned: Distributed system edge cases appear at 3 AM. Building fault-tolerant systems from day one — circuit breakers, dead-letter queues, Grafana alerts — is non-negotiable.

m2.title: Node.js upgrade: 14 → 18
m2.description: Led the migration to improve runtime performance

m3.title: React upgrade: 16 → 18
m3.description: Resolved hydration issues, enabled concurrent features

facebook-shopping.description: Facebook Catalog sync + Live Shopping UI for Sapo merchants.
facebook-shopping.artistStatement: I shipped the catalog sync engine and Facebook Live Shopping UI that lets merchants broadcast products directly to customers on Facebook — no more switching between Sapo and Meta Business Manager.
facebook-shopping.lessonsLearned: Facebook Catalog API has brutal rate limits. Batch processing with exponential backoff was added after the first production incident. Always design for rate limiting from day one.

m1.title: Facebook Shopping project started
m1.description: Integrated Facebook Catalog and Live Shopping into Sapo

m2.title: Live Shopping UI completed
m2.description: Merchants can now broadcast products directly to Facebook customers

wallet-app.description: Fintech demo: JWT auth, Google OAuth2, transaction tracking, deployed.
wallet-app.artistStatement: Built to prove I can ship a secure, production-ready auth system from scratch. JWT rotation, refresh token flow, OAuth2 callback edge cases — every scenario handled, not just the happy path.
wallet-app.lessonsLearned: Token refresh logic tangled with the main auth flow caused painful refactoring in week 3. Separation of concerns from day one would have saved a full day of rework.

m2.title: Backend Deploy
m2.description: Spring Boot BE deployed on GCP Cloud Run

portfolio-v2.description: AI-augmented full-stack portfolio: Spring Boot BE, React/TypeScript FE, CI/CD.
portfolio-v2.artistStatement: AI-augmented from commit #1. I use Claude Code and AI tools throughout the SDLC — spec drafting, implementation, test generation, linting, security review. This portfolio is proof that AI accelerates shipping without sacrificing quality. 13 days from first commit to production. 216+ passing tests.
portfolio-v2.lessonsLearned: BMAD agent orchestration for spec → implementation → tests is a game changer for solo developers. The test coverage is higher in 13 days than most teams achieve in 3 months.

m1.title: First Commit
m1.description: Project scaffolded with BMAD agent orchestration

m2.title: Production Deploy
m2.description: Live at chinhnt-portfolio.vercel.app — CI/CD automated, tests green

sapo-social-mobile.description: React Native mobile app for Sapo Social — responding to messages on the go.
sapo-social-mobile.artistStatement: Mobile was never my comfort zone. React Native forced me to think in components, not pages. Shipped the message reply UI with offline-first caching so sellers never miss an inquiry.
sapo-social-mobile.lessonsLearned: Offline-first on mobile is fundamentally different from web caching. The local SQLite database schema had to be redesigned twice after discovering sync conflicts in production. Offline-first is a mindset, not a library.

m1.title: Sapo Social Mobile
m1.description: Built mobile UI and API integration for Sapo Social Mobile app

m2.title: Offline-First Caching Shipped
m2.description: Message reply UI with local caching — sellers never miss an inquiry

hospital-website.description: Full-stack hospital booking system with load balancing and MongoDB.
hospital-website.artistStatement: My graduation thesis. As the project lead, I designed the load balancing architecture and built the full-stack booking flow in a 2-person team. nginx configuration for production traffic was the most valuable real-world skill I took away from this project.
hospital-website.lessonsLearned: Should have defined the MongoDB schema before touching the UI. Changed the schema 3 times, which broke the frontend each time. Schema-first development — lesson permanently learned.

m2.title: Defense
m2.description: Graduated with thesis on distributed hospital booking system

about.heading: Why Hire Me
about.whyHireMe: I'm an AI-augmented Fullstack Engineer — not in the 'I use Copilot' sense, but in the 'AI is a first-class tool in every phase of my workflow' sense. I use AI to draft specs, generate tests, catch edge cases, and keep my output consistent at scale. The result: 216+ passing tests, CI/CD on day 13, and a portfolio that's honest about what I've built and how I built it. I'm looking for a team that values shipping with quality over shipping with noise.
